ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the individual */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the individual */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the individual */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_workclass FOREIGN KEY ("workclass") REFERENCES employment ("workclass"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_occupation FOREIGN KEY ("occupation") REFERENCES employment ("occupation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_education FOREIGN KEY ("education") REFERENCES education ("education_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level (e.g., Some-college, Bachelors) */,
  "education_num_na" INTEGER /* Indicator for whether education number is NA */,
  "education_num" REAL /* Education number (e.g., -0.0312, 1.1422) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Work class (e.g., Private, Self-emp-not-inc) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation (e.g., Other-service, Exec-managerial) */,
  "hours_per_week" REAL /* Hours per week */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "capital_gain" REAL /* Capital gain */,
  "capital_loss" REAL /* Capital loss */,
  "fnlwgt" REAL /* Final weight */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_fnlwgt FOREIGN KEY ("fnlwgt") REFERENCES demographics ("fnlwgt"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_capital_gain FOREIGN KEY ("capital_gain") REFERENCES demographics ("capital_gain"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_capital_loss FOREIGN KEY ("capital_loss") REFERENCES demographics ("capital_loss")
)

CREATE TABLE "target" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target record */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target variable (e.g., <50k, >=50k) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_target_target FOREIGN KEY ("target") REFERENCES demographics ("income_level")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "is_successful" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access was successful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "data_collection_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of data collection */,
  "data_collection_end_date" TEXT /* End date of data collection */,
  "data_collection_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data collection process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_data" (
  "demographic_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic data record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data" TEXT /* Demographic data (e.g., age, sex, education level) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_data" (
  "education_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education data record */,
  "education_id" INTEGER /* ID of the education record */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data" TEXT /* Education data (e.g., education level, education number) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_education_id FOREIGN KEY ("education_id") REFERENCES education ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_data" (
  "employment_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment data record */,
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment record */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "data" TEXT /* Employment data (e.g., work class, occupation, hours per week) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_data_employment_id FOREIGN KEY ("employment_id") REFERENCES employment ("employment_id")
)
